basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand Building And Other Construction Workers’ Welfare Board

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Sanitary Napkin Scheme” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free sanitary napkins to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers, in order to promote health and hygiene.
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. Under the scheme, free sanitary napkins will be provided to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free sanitary napkins to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers, in order to promote health and hygiene.

children.text: The scheme “Sanitary Napkin Scheme” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free sanitary napkins to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers, in order to promote health and hygiene.
Under the scheme, free sanitary napkins will be provided to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers.
The online application can be submitted through Shramik Suvidha Kendras.

Along with the application form, applicants must attach a self-attested photocopy of the Shramik Card, Aadhaar Card, A Self-Declaration Certificate stating that no similar benefit has been availed from any other department.
After verification, sanitary napkins are provided by the department.

applicationProcess.process_md: - The online application can be submitted through Shramik Suvidha Kendras. - Along with the application form, applicants must attach a self-attested photocopy of the Shramik Card, Aadhaar Card, A Self-Declaration Certificate stating that no similar benefit has been availed from any other department. - After verification, sanitary napkins are provided by the department.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a registered construction worker with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. 1. The benefits of the scheme will be provided to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers registered with the Board.

children.text: The applicant must be a registered construction worker with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
The benefits of the scheme will be provided to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers registered with the Board.
